customer_message: I cancelled my subscription but you still billed my credit card.
agent_response: I'm sorry. We'll verify your cancellation request and process a refund if applicable.

customer_message: I want to cancel my account permanently.
agent_response: We'll process your account deletion request within 48 hours.

customer_message: My payment failed three times but money has been deducted.
agent_response: We're investigating the failed transactions and will reverse any incorrect charges.

customer_message: The order arrived but several items are missing.
agent_response: We're sorry. We'll ship the missing items immediately.

customer_message: I forgot my password and verification email never arrives.
agent_response: We've resent the verification email. Please check your spam folder.
